title: A Stable Right-Sided Quaternion Fourier Regime for Multichannel Spectral Analysis
abstract: This draft package prepares the structural publication surfaces for a right-sided quaternion Fourier analysis paper focused on multichannel spectral workflows. The current revision captures machine-readable metadata, claims placeholders, notation placeholders, and exchange files so the series can be indexed consistently while technical derivations are still in progress. It is explicitly a scaffolding release and does not present completed proofs, experimental measurements, or finalized publication details such as DOI, venue, or page range.
notes: Draft scaffold package for the RQM Quaternionic Signal Processing Series. Layout and companion files are in place; full manuscript content is pending.
